tagline: Building AI-driven systems, data platforms, and space-tech inspired applications.
description: Computer Engineering student focused on AI, Data Engineering, and scalable software systems. Passionate about building intelligent applications, predictive analytics platforms, and space-tech inspired solutions using modern technologies.

roles.detailed: AI Engineer · Data Engineer · Backend Developer · System Designer

bio: Computer Engineering student with strong foundations in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Engineering, and Backend Development. Experienced in building predictive analytics systems, AI-powered platforms, and scalable REST APIs using Python, FastAPI, and modern data tools. Skilled in data preprocessing, EDA, workflow automation, and developing end-to-end machine learning systems. Passionate about space-tech, autonomous systems, and building intelligent solutions inspired by real-world scientific challenges like Mars rover navigation and mission risk analysis.

bullets: Researched autonomous AI navigation systems for Martian rover exploration, focusing on path planning and obstacle avoidance.
Studied and implemented algorithms like A* and heuristic-based search for terrain-aware navigation.
Explored simulation models integrating AI, robotics, and space science concepts.
Documented research findings to improve analytical thinking and scientific communication.
experience.desc: Worked on AI-based autonomous navigation systems inspired by Mars rover missions, focusing on path planning, terrain analysis, and simulation-based learning.

bullets: Built a customer churn prediction model using Random Forest with ~88% accuracy and strong ROC-AUC performance.
Designed interactive Power BI dashboards to visualize customer risk segmentation and key churn drivers.
Automated data preprocessing and reporting workflows, improving efficiency by ~30%.
Enabled data-driven decision-making through clear analytical insights and visualization.
experience.desc: Worked on predictive analytics and business intelligence, combining machine learning with Power BI dashboards for real-world decision-making.

projects.title: GravitX
projects.subtitle: Space Mission Risk Analyzer
projects.desc: Developed an AI-powered predictive analytics platform to estimate space mission success probability using historical launch data, environmental conditions, and mission parameters. Built ML models (Random Forest ~88%, XGBoost ~89%), implemented full data science lifecycle (EDA, feature engineering, training), and deployed using FastAPI with an interactive React frontend.

projects.title: Kuberly
projects.subtitle: Financial Ledger Backend API
projects.desc: Developed a scalable backend API for a personal finance management system with secure JWT authentication, encrypted password handling, and automated email notifications. Designed optimized MongoDB schemas and REST APIs for efficient transaction processing.

projects.title: Satellite Orbit Simulation
projects.subtitle: Physics-Based Simulation Dashboard
projects.desc: Built a physics-based simulation system to model satellite motion and orbital mechanics. Visualized 3D trajectories, velocity changes, and altitude variations using numerical analysis and mathematical modeling.

projects.title: Fitness Analytics Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Business Intelligence System
projects.desc: Developed an interactive dashboard to analyze fitness business performance including KPIs like profitability, retention, and trainer efficiency using Power BI and DAX queries.

projects.title: Mumbai Housing Analytics
projects.subtitle: Data Science Project
projects.desc: Analyzed real estate data to identify pricing trends and market patterns using EDA, statistical modeling, and visualization techniques to generate predictive insights.

publications.title: Before ChatGPT: The Untold Story of How AI Quietly Evolved Over Decades
publications.desc: A storytelling-driven deep dive into the evolution of Artificial Intelligence—from early theoretical foundations to modern breakthroughs like ChatGPT. Explores how decades of research in machine learning and deep learning quietly shaped today’s AI revolution.

publications.title: The Hidden Carbon Cost of the Cloud: Why Green Computing is the Future of Scalable Systems
publications.desc: Explores the environmental impact of modern cloud systems and why sustainability is becoming a core pillar of software engineering. Covers energy consumption, efficient architectures, and how developers can design greener, scalable systems.

publications.title: Your Code Works, But Your System Doesn’t: The Missing Layer Every Developer Ignores
publications.desc: A real-world perspective on why working code doesn’t guarantee a reliable system. Breaks down the importance of system design, scalability, failure handling, and thinking beyond individual components to build production-ready software.

publications.title: Chandrayaan-2 Didn’t Fail—It Quietly Solved One of Space Exploration’s Biggest Problems
publications.desc: Reframes the Chandrayaan-2 mission beyond failure narratives, highlighting how its data and learnings contributed to solving critical challenges in lunar landing systems, navigation, and future mission design.
